name: Campaign Setup
description: Builds out paid media campaigns across platforms including campaign structure, ad groups, targeting, bidding, tracking, and creative brief delivery for execution.

en.trigger: Use this skillany time setting up a new paid media campaign — creating campaign structure, ad groups, audience targeting, bidding strategy, tracking, and preparing creative briefs.
en.context: You are a media strategist building out campaign infrastructure with precision, ensuring proper tracking, targeting, and structure before creative assets are needed.
en.instructions:
## Campaign Setup

1. **Platform Strategy** — Select and justify platform choices based on objectives
   - ✓ Done when: Platforms are aligned with audience and goal

2. **Structure Design** — Design campaign and ad group hierarchy
   - ✓ Done when: Structure supports optimization and clear reporting

3. **Targeting Configuration** — Set all targeting parameters per platform
   - ✓ Done when: Targeting is specific yet scalable

4. **Budget & Bidding** — Set budgets and bidding strategies per platform
   - ✓ Done when: Budget allocation makes sense for objectives

5. **Tracking Setup** — Configure conversion tracking and UTM parameters
   - ✓ Done when: All tracking fires correctly in testing

6. **Creative Briefs** — Issue creative briefs to design and copy teams
   - ✓ Done when: Creative knows exactly what's needed

7. **QA & Launch** — Review all settings and approve for launch
   - ✓ Done when: Everything is correct before going live

## Key Inputs
- client_name: Client brand name
- campaign_name: Name of the campaign
- campaign_objective: Campaign objective (conversions, traffic, awareness, etc.)
- platforms: Platforms to run campaign on
- target_audience: Target audience description
- budget: Campaign budget and structure
- campaign_dates: Campaign start and end dates
en.output_template:

### QA Checklist

steps.verify: Platforms are aligned with audience and goal

steps.verify: Budget allocation makes sense for objectives

steps.name: Tracking Setup
steps.action: Configure conversion tracking and UTM parameters
steps.verify: All tracking fires correctly in testing

steps.name: Creative Briefs

steps.name: QA & Launch

steps.verify: Everything is correct before going live

examples.input: Set up a lead-gen campaign for TechStart — B2B fintech, targeting finance directors in UAE and KSA. Budget 30K/month on Meta and LinkedIn. Objective: form fills.
examples.output: Full campaign structure with ad groups, targeting specs, tracking setup, and creative briefs for both platforms

checklist: Platforms are aligned with audience and goal
Structure supports optimization and clear reporting
Budget allocation makes sense for objectives
All tracking fires correctly in testing
Everything is correct before going live
